notes: Fix: short invalid laps from Active Reset no longer upload telemetry to R2 when LapLastLapTime is a stale value from a prior penalized lap. This significantly reduces storage consumption in sessions with many resets.
notas: Fix: voltas invalidas curtas de Active Reset nao sobem mais telemetria ao R2 quando LapLastLapTime e valor residual de volta penalizada anterior. Reduz significativamente o consumo de armazenamento em sessoes com muitos resets.
